Name: Winter's Warmth I
Description: Attain rank 3 reputation (friendly) with the Hands of Zirgorteh.

Name: Winter's Warmth II
Description: Attain rank 4 reputation (trusted) with the Hands of Zirgorteh.

Name: Winter's Warmth III
Description: Attain rank 6 reputation (honored) with the Hands of Zirgorteh.

Name: Peak Performance
Description: Attain rank 7 reputation (sworn) with the Hands of Zirgorteh.

Name: プンシュで乾杯！
The Spice of Starlight
Description: クエスト「星芒祭と心躍る一杯」をコンプリートする
Complete the quest “We Three Kinderpunsch.”

Name: Pilgrim's Progress I
Description: Clear the area marked by stone 10 of Pilgrim's Traverse.

Name: Pilgrim's Progress II
Description: Clear the area marked by stone 20 of Pilgrim's Traverse.

Name: Pilgrim's Progress III
Description: Clear the area marked by stone 30 of Pilgrim's Traverse.

Name: Pilgrim's Progress IV
Description: Clear the area marked by stone 50 of Pilgrim's Traverse.

Name: Pilgrim's Progress VI
Description: Clear the area marked by stone 100 of Pilgrim's Traverse.

Name: No Longer Limp
Description: Obtain a weapon of the First Light.

Name: That Wasn't Wine
Description: Obtain a sacramental weapon.

Name: Solo Traveler I
Description: Clear the 1st through the 50th areas of Pilgrim's Traverse solo and reach stone 51.

Name: Solo Traveler II
Description: Clear the 1st through the 100th areas of Pilgrim's Traverse solo.

Name: For the Hoard VII
Description: Discover 30,000 pieces of the Accursed Hoard.

Name: Faerie Favors
Description: Speak with Aenc Daen while in possession of all four accessories of the First Light.

Name: Unholy Sacrament
Description: Complete the Final Verse (Quantum).

Name: Unholy Devotion
Description: Complete the Final Verse (Quantum) with the maximum amount of sacramental offerings.

Name: Triple-decker XIV
Description: Obtain 451 unique Triple Triad cards.

Name: Guardian Hunter
Description: Complete the quest “The White Wanderer.”

Name: Guardiansbane
Description: Defeat Guardian Arkveld in the Windward Wilds (Extreme).

Name: Pilgrim's Progress V
Description: Clear the area marked by stone 70 of Pilgrim's Traverse.
